title: GitHub OAuth
description: Configure one or more GitHub identity providers for OpenShift OAuth. Credentials are loaded from Vault by external secret name at apply time.

title: Hostname
description: Optional GitHub Enterprise hostname. Leave empty to use github.com.

title: Mapping Method
description: OpenShift identity mapping method. claim=use GitHub username directly, lookup=must pre-exist, generate=create unique name, add=link existing.

title: Providers
description: GitHub identity providers to render into OpenShift OAuth configuration. Each provider maps to one GitHub OAuth App.

title: Secret Namespace
description: Namespace where OAuth client secret objects are created. Should match the OAuth cluster configuration namespace.

title: Advanced Cluster Management (ACM)
description: Sets up a full ACM hub for ZTP/CAPI deployments. Specify {} for all defaults.

title: AgentServiceConfig
description: Assisted-service storage configuration for cluster installation management. Controls PVC sizes for databases, ISOs, and OS images.

title: Channel
description: OLM subscription channel. Version-pinned (e.g. release-2.13, release-2.14).

title: MultiClusterHub
description: MultiClusterHub instance configuration. The central management component of ACM.

title: Provisioning
description: Assisted-service provisioning configuration. Use plugins.baremetal.ironic for Ironic/Metal3 settings.

title: ArgoCD / OpenShift GitOps
description: Installs openshift-gitops-operator and configures an ArgoCD instance. Specify {} for all defaults.

title: ApplicationSet
description: Enable the ApplicationSet controller for templated multi-cluster Application generation.

title: Bootstrap Application
description: App-of-apps bootstrap Application that manages further operators and configuration from a Git repository.

title: Channel
description: OLM subscription channel (e.g. latest, gitops-1.14).

title: High Availability
description: Enable HA for ArgoCD components (multiple replicas for server, repo, and controller).

title: Notifications
description: Enable the ArgoCD notifications controller for event-driven alerts (Slack, email, webhooks).

title: RBAC
description: ArgoCD role-based access control configuration.

title: Repo Server
description: ArgoCD repo server configuration for Git repository operations.

title: cert-manager Operator
description: TLS certificate automation. Install-and-go operator with no additional CRs needed for base install. Specify {} for all defaults.

title: Channel
description: OLM subscription channel (e.g. stable-v1).

title: LetsEncrypt Configuration
description: Configure cert-manager with LetsEncrypt DNS-01 validation. Choose the provider as aws or cloudflare. AWS uses Route53 for DNS-01. Renders ExternalSecret, ClusterIssuer, and Certificate resources.

title: External Secrets Operator
description: Sync secrets from external stores (HashiCorp Vault, AWS Secrets Manager, Azure Key Vault, GCP Secret Manager). Runs in all-namespaces mode via openshift-operators. Specify {} for all defaults.

title: Channel
description: OLM subscription channel (e.g. stable-v1).

title: Vault Backend
description: Configure a ClusterSecretStore backed by HashiCorp Vault or OpenBao with Kubernetes auth.

title: Local Storage Operator (LSO)
description: Exposes local block devices as PVs via LocalVolumeSet. Provides StorageClass for ODF on bare-metal/KubeVirt nodes. Specify {} for all defaults.

title: Channel
description: OLM subscription channel (e.g. stable, stable-4.18).

title: Device Inclusion Spec
description: Filter which local devices the operator should discover and provision. Omit to use all available block devices.

title: Node Selector
description: Label selector for nodes with local disks. Defaults to ODF storage label: cluster.ocs.openshift.io/openshift-storage.

title: Storage Class Name
description: Name of the StorageClass created by the LocalVolumeSet. Referenced by ODF StorageCluster as the underlying block PVC class.

title: Volume Mode
description: PV volume mode. Block for ODF/Ceph raw device access; Filesystem for general-purpose file storage.

title: LVM Storage (LVMS)
description: Local volume management for SNO and compact clusters using TopoLVM. Specify {} for all defaults.

title: Channel
description: OLM subscription channel (e.g. stable, stable-4.18).

title: Device Classes
description: LVM volume group device class configurations. Defaults to single vg1 using all available disks.

title: Thin Pool Config
description: Thin provisioning configuration. Enables overprovisioning of storage capacity.

title: OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
description: Ceph-based distributed storage for HA clusters (3+ nodes with data disks). Specify {} for all defaults.

title: Channel
description: OLM subscription channel. Version-pinned (e.g. stable-4.18, stable-4.19).

title: Storage Cluster
description: StorageCluster CR configuration for Ceph-based storage pools, block devices, and replication.

title: Pull Secret
description: Path to file containing Red Hat pull secret JSON for registry authentication.

title: Cluster
description: Cluster-level configuration for installation.

title: Architecture
description: CPU architecture.

title: Catalog Sources
description: Custom operator catalog sources for disconnected installations. Requires cluster.disconnected: true.

title: Cluster Type
description: Cluster topology. Derived from host count — do not set unless using HighlyAvailableArbiter. 1 control = SNO, 3+ controls = HighlyAvailable.

title: Core User Password
description: Path to file containing the plaintext password for the 'core' OS user. Automatically included as a MachineConfig (control-plane + worker) when operators.yaml.tpl is rendered.

title: CPU Partitioning
description: Workload partitioning mode. AllNodes enables management workload isolation on all nodes (typically for SNO).

title: Disconnected
description: Air-gapped cluster configuration. Presence of this key enables disconnected mode: disables default OperatorHub sources and skips internet-dependent sync jobs.

title: Disk Encryption
description: Structured disk encryption configuration. Use cluster.tpm as shorthand for TPM2.

title: FIPS Mode
description: Enable FIPS 140-2/140-3 cryptographic module validation on all cluster nodes and control plane components.

title: Cluster Location
description: Geographic or logical location label attached to ManagedCluster and InfraEnv resources (e.g. 'datacenter-1', 'eu-west'). Used by ACM for placement policies and reporting.

title: Manifests
description: Extra Kubernetes manifests to apply during installation.

title: Image Mirrors
description: Registry mirrors for disconnected installations.

title: Cluster Name
description: DNS-compatible cluster name (lowercase, hyphens allowed, max 63 chars).

title: Platform
description: Target infrastructure platform for the cluster.

title: Release Image Digest
description: SHA256 digest of the release image. Required for disconnected installs where IDMS/ICSP only trigger on digest pulls. Get with: oc adm release info quay.io/openshift-release-dev/ocp-release:<version>-<

title: SSH Keys
description: SSH public keys for node access (OpenSSH format).

title: TPM Disk Encryption
description: Enable LUKS disk encryption with TPM 2.0 on the provisioned cluster. On virtual platforms (kubevirt), a persistent vTPM device is automatically added to VMs.

title: OpenShift Version
description: OpenShift release version to install.

title: Hosts
description: Host inventory keyed by hostname (minimum 1 host required).

title: BMC
description: Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) — called iDRAC on Dell servers, iLO on HP/HPE, and IPMI/Redfish on most others.

title: Address
description: BMC endpoint (IP, FQDN, or protocol://host).

title: Vendor
description: BMC hardware vendor (iDRAC on Dell, iLO on HP/HPE, IPMI on others). Controls the Redfish driver: dell→idrac-virtualmedia (iDRAC 9+) or redfish-virtualmedia (older), hp/hpe→redfish-virtualmedia (iLO5;

title: Boot Mode
description: Host boot mode for BareMetalHost provisioning.

title: Ignition Config Override
description: JSON ignition config merged during discovery for this BareMetalHost. Overrides auto-generated mirror/registry config. Use sparingly — prefer cluster.mirrors for registry mirroring.

title: Installer Arguments
description: Extra coreos-installer arguments passed to the assisted agent at install time (JSON array string, e.g. '["-n"]'). Use for custom kernel arguments or disk selection.

title: Network
description: Host-specific network configuration.

title: Interfaces
description: Physical network interfaces on the host.

title: Role
description: Node role: control (control-plane), worker, or bootstrap.

title: Storage
description: Disk hints for OS installation.

title: WWN
description: World Wide Name identifier.

title: Availability Zone
description: Logical availability zone for this node. Injected as the 'topology.kubernetes.io/zone' node label — used by ODF rack awareness, scheduler topology constraints, and placement policies.

title: Network
description: Network configuration for cluster and node networking.

title: Cluster Network
description: Pod network CIDR and per-node allocation.

title: Host Prefix
description: Subnet prefix per node (23=/512 pods, 24=/256 pods).

title: Pod Network CIDR
description: IP range for pod networking. Defaults to the OCP standard 10.128.0.0/14.

title: DNS Resolver
description: DNS resolver configuration.

title: Search Domains
description: DNS search domains (max 6).

title: Base Domain
description: Base DNS domain (e.g., example.com). Cannot be changed after installation.

title: DNS Servers
description: DNS server IPs (1-3 recommended).

title: NTP Servers
description: NTP server addresses (IP or FQDN) injected into the InfraEnv discovery image. Required for bare-metal installs where nodes cannot reach public NTP.

title: Primary Network
description: Primary network settings for cluster communication.

title: Bond Mode
description: Linux bonding mode (active-backup, balance-rr, etc.). Omit or set false for no bonding.

title: Gateway
description: Default gateway IP address.

title: MTU
description: Interface MTU. Select preset, enter custom (576-9216), or disable to omit.

title: Virtual IPs
description: Virtual IPs for API and ingress endpoints.

title: API VIP
description: Kubernetes API virtual IP (single or dual-stack array).

title: Ingress VIP
description: Application ingress virtual IP (single or dual-stack array).

title: VLAN ID
description: VLAN tag for OCP node traffic (1-4094). Omit or set false for untagged.

title: Proxy
description: Proxy settings for cluster egress traffic.

title: HTTP Proxy
description: HTTP proxy URL (http://host:port).

title: HTTPS Proxy
description: HTTPS proxy URL (http://host:port or https://host:port).

title: No Proxy
description: Comma-separated hosts/CIDRs that bypass the proxy.

title: Secondary Networks
description: Additional networks (storage, OOB, provisioning).

title: Bond Mode
description: Linux bonding mode. Use false to disable.

title: MTU
description: Interface MTU. Select preset, enter custom (576-9216), or disable to omit.

title: Network Name
description: Logical name (e.g., storage, oob).

title: Subnet
description: Network CIDR or 'dhcp' for dynamic.

title: Network Type
description: NMState interface type.

title: VLAN ID
description: VLAN tag (1-4094). Use false for untagged.

title: Service Network
description: Service network CIDR for ClusterIP allocation.

title: Service CIDR
description: IP range for Kubernetes Services. Defaults to the OCP standard 172.30.0.0/16.

title: Trust Bundle
description: Path to PEM-encoded CA certificate bundle for cluster-wide TLS trust.

title: Plugins
description: Platform-specific plugin configurations.

title: AWS
description: AWS IPI platform settings.

title: Azure
description: Azure IPI platform settings.

title: Baremetal
description: Baremetal platform settings.

title: Host
description: Default BareMetalHost provisioning behavior applied to all managed cluster hosts.

title: Operator
description: Metal3/Ironic operator configuration on the ACM hub. Applied via the Provisioning CR.

title: Disable Virtual Media TLS
description: Disable TLS for Ironic virtual media. Required for BMC vendors (e.g. Supermicro) that cannot validate self-signed certificates.

title: GCP
description: GCP IPI platform settings.

title: IBM Cloud
description: IBM Cloud IPI platform settings.

title: KubeVirt
description: KubeVirt / OpenShift Virtualization settings for VM-based cluster provisioning.

title: Nutanix
description: Nutanix platform integration settings.

title: OpenStack
description: OpenStack IPI platform settings.

title: vSphere
description: vSphere IPI platform settings.
